title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules, attributed to Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei, for deciding what products and features are worth building with Claude. The video is framed as general product strategy guidance for entrepreneurs and individuals working on side projects or businesses.
